name: python3-lark
title: python3-lark
description:
Parsing library for Python (Python 3)
lark is a parsing library for Python which allows one to parse any
context-free grammar. It has implemented the following parsing
algorithms: Earley, LALR(1) and CYK.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-lark because Parsing library for Python (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-lark as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-lark with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-lark --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
